I've been fiddling with other writing styles recently as I'm really trying to work on the 'show, don't tell' writing uhh thingy whatever you call it. Principle? Idk may not be the right word. I've also been experimenting with going more into character's thoughts to make them feel more alive.

I also honestly can't believe that I haven't written femzai before. Legitimately I should've written some for her by now but just hadn't done it for some reason. About requests, genuinely sorry I've been taking so long to do much with any of them. Honestly, I just get ideas and feel like I need to write them first before anything else and sometimes I struggle to write something if I tell myself to do it.
